central_repository: Rhode Island State Archives, Providence; Rhode Island Historical Society, Providence
migration_note: Initial v3.1 generation on 2026-03-11 using generate_ri.py. Rhode Island has only 5 counties (smallest county count of any US state). Counties have no governmental functions — towns are the primary local jurisdiction. All 5 county research tips are unique and reference RI-specific repositories.

batches.description: State-level repositories, resources, and research guides for Rhode Island
